source_note: Derived from manually copied dYdX candle responses observed on Crypto Wizards pair page. Spread and zscore are reconstructed locally. Funding is not fabricated; merge real dYdX funding with --funding-path before production acceptance. ECM fields are provisional derived estimates, not native Crypto Wizards ECM payload values. Additional research columns such as conditional_probability_distortion, half_life, hurst, tail_dependence, and model confidence inputs are provisional derived features used to exercise the strategy research harness.
